ddls:
CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of the network (e.g., social, communication, biological) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the network was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the network was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the network */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the network (e.g., public, private, shared) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_networks_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the node belongs to */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node (e.g., user, device) */,
  "attributes" TEXT /* Additional attributes of the node in JSON format */,
  "node_description" TEXT /* Description of the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_nodes_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_edges" (
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edge */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the edge belongs to */,
  "source_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source node */,
  "target_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target node */,
  "edge_type" TEXT /* Type of the edge (e.g., friendship, communication link) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the edge (e.g., strength of the relationship) */,
  "edge_description" TEXT /* Description of the edge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_edges_target_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_node_id") REFERENCES network_nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_edges_source_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_node_id") REFERENCES network_nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_edges_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_detection_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community detection run */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the run is for */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for community detection */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the algorithm in JSON format */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date and time the run was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., completed, running, failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_detection_runs_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community result */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community detection run */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node in the community */,
  "modularity" REAL /* Modularity score of the community */,
  "class_split" REAL /* Class split score of the community */,
  "class_merge" REAL /* Class merge score of the community */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES community_detection_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_results_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES network_nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community result the metric is for */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., modularity, class split, class merge) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_metrics_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES community_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_parameters_algorithm FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm") REFERENCES community_detection_runs ("algorithm")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network version */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_versions_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the network or result */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community detection run */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the network or result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES community_detection_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network property */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., number of nodes, number of edges) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_properties_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community property */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., number of nodes, average node degree) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_properties_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES community_results ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community detection run */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES community_detection_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm version */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm") REFERENCES community_detection_runs ("algorithm")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network comparison */,
  "network_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first network */,
  "network_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second network */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of the comparison (e.g., structural, performance) */,
  "comparison_results" TEXT /* Results of the comparison in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_comparisons_network_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("network_id2") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_comparisons_network_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("network_id1") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_similarity" (
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node similarity */,
  "node_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first node */,
  "node_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second node */,
  "network_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first network */,
  "network_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second network */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score between the nodes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_similarity_node_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("node_id1") REFERENCES network_nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_similarity_network_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("network_id1") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_similarity_network_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("network_id2") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_similarity_node_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("node_id2") REFERENCES network_nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_similarity" (
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community similarity */,
  "community_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first community */,
  "community_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second community */,
  "network_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first network */,
  "network_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second network */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score between the communities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_similarity_network_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("network_id2") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_similarity_community_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("community_id1") REFERENCES community_results ("community_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_similarity_network_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("network_id1") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_similarity_community_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("community_id2") REFERENCES community_results ("community_id")
)
